headline: Cardinal Health Pre-Q3 Analysis: Buy, Hold or Sell the Stock Now?
summary: CAH's Q3 results are likely to benefit from strong specialty momentum and GMPD progress, but tougher comps and tariff pressures may test upside.

headline: SENS Launches Eversense 365, World's Only One-Year CGM in Europe
summary: Senseonics launches Eversense 365 in Europe, debuting the first year-long CGM system as it expands into key markets and targets millions of new patients.

headline: The 3 Dividend Aristocrats Wall Street Calls a ‘Strong Buy’ With Up to 46% Upside
summary: These 3 Strong Buy Dividend Aristocrats have decades of payout growth, durable businesses, and analyst-backed upside of up to 46%.
